'''Affytechans''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of tall, bipedal [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] plants native to [[Dom-Bradden]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Biology and appearance==
Each Affytechan had a unique growth of leaves, petals, tassels, and tendrils that sprouted from their bodies in a vast range of [[color]]s. Otherwise humanoid, they were bipedal with talon-like hands and extraordinarily malleable minds and personalities that changed rapidly to match their cultural environment. Their pollen was noxious to the [[Human/Legends|human]] nostril. They reproduced by slaughtering and dismembering other members of the species and then watering them, after which sprouts would grow from the corpses and mature to adulthood within a few days. Their standard body temperature was 83 degrees.

==History==
A number of Affytechans were abducted by the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' and brainwashed into believing themselves [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] naval crewmen of the vessel, consulting blank computer screens and carrying brooms and mops as [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. These included [[Breen]], who believed himself an Imperial medic and was recruited by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to locate transports off the ''Eye''.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
